case_title: VINCE THOMAS VS. GOLDMINE HILL HOA

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER FILED BY THOMAS, VINCE GOLDMINE HILL HOA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS, VINCE AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDMINE HILL HOA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-01-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-01-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARGARET WU. PLAINTIFF VINCE THOMAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GOLDMINE HILL HOA IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KATIE HARNISH (COMMUNITY MANAGER) AND PATRICK CARROLL (DIRECTOR). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET WU; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMAS, VINCE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GOLDMINE HILL HOA PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET BURDEN OF PROOF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-12-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDMINE HILL HOA
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO GOLDMINE HILL HOA [HEARING 09/01/23 AT 3:309PM]
